headline: Jefferies Maintains Hold on Constellation Brands, Lowers Price Target to $157
summary: Jefferies  analyst Kaumil Gajrawala   maintains Constellation Brands (NYSE:STZ) with a Hold and lowers the price target from $158 to $157.

headline: Constellation Brands Earnings Preview: What to Expect
summary: Constellation Brands all geared to report its first-quarter earnings next month, and analysts expect a single-digit rise in profits.

headline: Constellation Gears Up For Q1 Print; Here Are The Recent Forecast Changes From Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts
summary: Constellation Brands (NYSE: STZ) will release Q1 earnings on 6/30, with analysts expecting $3.25 EPS and $2.4B in revenue. Latest analyst ratings also available.
